zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith von Thüringen於從1130年到1135年出生在德國賀林根瓦特包可萊斯時，她的父親Ludwig I. von Thüringen45歲，母親Hedwig von Gudensberg37歲。她於1153年與Vladislav II Přemyslovec結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1174年9月9日之後在德國格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀瓦特包格，埋葬在捷克斯洛伐克傑特普利採。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Thüringen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (Thüringer): habitational name for someone from Thuringia. The region is named from its former occupation by the T(h)uringii, an ancient Germanic tribe. Compare Deringer and Dieringer .

variants.name: Deringer
meanings: from a short form of an old personal name, a variant of Därr (see Darr ).
variant of Döringer, a habitational name for someone from Thuringia (see Doering ). Compare Derringer .

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judith von Thüringen was born from 1130 to 1135, in Wartburgkreis, Thuringia, Germany, her father, Ludwig I. von Thüringen, was 45 and her mother, Hedwig von Gudensberg, was 37. She married Vladislav II Přemyslovec in 1153. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 9 September 1174, in Wartburg, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germany, and was buried in Teplice, Bohemia, Czechoslovakia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith von Thüringen est née du 1130 au 1135, à Wartburgkreis, Thüringen, Allemagne, son père, Ludwig I. von Thüringen, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Gudensberg, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Vladislav II Přemyslovec en 1153. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 9 septembre 1174, à Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Allemagne, et a été enterrée à Teplice, Bohême, Tchécoslovaquie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judith von Thüringen von 1130 bis 1135 in Wartburgkreis, Thüringen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ludwig I. von Thüringen 45 und ihre Mutter Hedwig von Gudensberg 37. Sie hat 1153 Vladislav II Přemyslovec geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 9. September 1174 in Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Deutschland und wurde in Teplice, Böhmen, Tschechoslowakei begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judith von Thüringen è nata il da 1130 a 1135 nel Wartburgkreis, Thüringen, Germania, sua padre, Ludwig I. von Thüringen, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Hedwig von Gudensberg, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Vladislav II Přemyslovec nel 1153. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 9 settembre 1174, nel Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Germania, e fu sepolta a Teplice, Čechy, Cecoslovacchia.

ko.Reinhardsbrunn, Friedrichroda, Gotha, Th: 독일 스u링 랜드크레이스 가스아 프리드리크로다 레인하르드스브루

ko.lifeSummary: Judith von Thüringen(이)가 1130년 부터 1135년 까지 독일 스u링 워트버그크레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ludwig I. von Thüringen(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hedwig von Gudensberg(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1153년 Vladislav II Přemyslovec(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1174년 9월 9일 이후 독일 그로ss헤어즈그투 작센-위마-이센악h 워트버그에서 사망했으며 체코 슬로바키아 cc히 테프라이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judith von Thüringen nasceu de 1130 a 1135, em Wartburgkreis, Thüringen, Alemanha, seu pai, Ludwig I. von Thüringen, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Hedwig von Gudensberg, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Vladislav II Přemyslovec em 1153. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 9 de setembro de 1174, em Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemanha, e foi sepultada em Teplice, Čechy, Tchecoslováquia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith von Thüringen родилась с 1130 по 1135 в местности вартбургкрис, тuринген, Германия, её отцу по имени Ludwig I. von Thüringen было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Gudensberg, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Vladislav II Přemyslovec в 1153 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 9 сентябрь 1174 г. в местности вартбург, гроssхирзогтум сачсен-вимар-исенач, Германия и была похоронена в местности теплаис, cечи, Чехословакия.

Se casó con Vladislav II Přemyslovec en 1153. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas.
